methodsAttempted.notes: Fetched https://uit.no/robots.txt. Public article and information pages were not broadly disallowed; disallowed content/system paths were not crawled.

methodsAttempted.query: site:uit.no (ChatGPT OR "generative AI" OR "artificial intelligence" OR "kunstig intelligens" OR KI) (policy OR guidelines OR students OR exams OR assessment OR academic integrity OR privacy) "UiT"
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search returned the official UiT artificial-intelligence information page, exams page, several Tavla event pages, an official library tools page, and research/publication pages.
Firecrawl search confirmed the official exams page as the relevant academic-integrity source; Septentrio articles and workshop/event pages were not used as university policy evidence.
Firecrawl search located the Norwegian exams page and central AI information page. The English versions were used for claim text where available.
Firecrawl map over the official English site identified https://en.uit.no/exams as the source for AI exam levels, statements, citation, and verification guidance.

methodsAttempted.query: approved tools artificial intelligence UiT exams
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl map identified the central AI page and exams page as official sources for approved AI tools and data-class notes.

methodsAttempted.query: ChatUiT Copilot data class AI tools approved
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl map identified the official employee ChatUiT and AI page, which lists ChatUiT, Bing Copilot, DeepSeek, and M365 Copilot status notes.

artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery found three substantive UiT pages for AI policy/guidance evidence: the central artificial-intelligence information page, the exams page with an AI-and-exams section, and the employee ChatUiT and AI tools page. Event, research-publication, and course-description results were rejected as insufficient for university policy claims.

artifacts.title: University of Tromsø The Arctic University of Norway AI Policy Source Notes
artifacts.summary: Staged OpenClaw extraction found official UiT guidance on AI use in exams, course-coordinator control of permitted AI use, approved AI tools and data classes, personal/sensitive data limits, DeepSeek restrictions, and ChatUiT user-data handling. Claims are machine-reviewed by the crawl worker only and are not canonical public facts.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
The worker used English official UiT pages when available and did not infer university-wide binding policy from events, course descriptions, or scholarly articles.
The staged claims are agent-reviewed candidates only; no human review or canonical publication status is asserted.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
